name: Dr. Helena Vance
bio: Former senior cryptographer at the National Strategic Agency and director of Applied Quantum Research. Helena spent 14 years architecting hardened state cryptomechanisms before co-founding CYBER/PRECISION to fund sovereign tech infrastructure.

name: Marcus Kross
bio: Mechanical engineer with private sector space heritage. Led physical structural teams for lunar orbital missions and laser telemetry payloads. Marcus heads our engineering diligence and precision manufacturing scaling advisory.

name: Sven Lindqvist
bio: Decade of experience designing autonomous feedback loops for specialized subsea and industrial mineral extraction. Sven bridges the gap between software controllers and physically dangerous, extreme environments.
